---
title: "Nalin Wadhwa"
description-meta: "Nalin Wadhwa - PhD Student at UIUC"
image: "files/images/profile.jpeg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:nalin.wadhwa02@gmail.com
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=A8Zxn6UAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/nalinwadhwa02/
      target: _blank
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/nalin_wadhwa
      target: _blank
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Hi, I'm Nalin. 

I'm a PhD student in Computer Science at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign.

### Education and Experience

**PhD in Computer Science** at **University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign** advised by [Gagandeep Singh](https://ggndpsngh.github.io/) &mdash; 2025 – Present

**Research Fellow**  at **Microsoft Research India** with [Dr. Sriram Rajamani](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/people/sriram/), [Dr. Aditya Kanade](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/people/kanadeaditya/), and [Dr. Nagarajan Natarajan](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/people/nagarajn/) &mdash; 2023 – 2025

**B.Tech in Computer Science** at **Indian Institute of Technology Delhi**, Undergraduate thesis with [Prof. Sorav Bansal](https://sorav.compiler.ai/).

### Research

My research focuses on building robust, verifiable and trustworthy AI systems. I am studying large language models through the lens of formal methods, and I belive we should use formal tools and symbolic techniques to understand and provide guarantees on model behavior. I am currently working towards deterministic verification and robustness of large language models. I have also worked on Machine Learning for Software Engineering (ML4SE) &mdash; including automated program repair, code generation, and LLM-based coding agents for complex software development tasks. Broadly, I'm excited about bridging formal methods, machine learning, and software engineering to create AI systems that are both powerful and trustworthy.

## Publications

A full list lives on the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

**BEAVER: An Efficient Deterministic LLM Verifier**<br>
**Nalin Wadhwa**\*, Tarun Suresh\*, Debangshu Banerjee, Gagandeep Singh<br>
<span style="color:red">*ICLR 2026 Oral VerifAI2 Workshop*</span><br>[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.05439)] [[GitHub](https://github.com/uiuc-focal-lab/Beaver)]


**Code Researcher: Deep Research Agent for Large Systems Code and Commit History**<br>
Ramneet Singh, Sathvik Joel, Abhav Mehrotra, **Nalin Wadhwa**, Ramakrishna B Bairi, Aditya Kanade, Nagarajan Natarajan<br>
[[Project page](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/publication/code-researcher-deep-research-agent-for-large-systems-code-and-commit-history/)] [[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.11060)]

**MASAI: Modular Architecture for Software-engineering AI Agents**<br>
**Nalin Wadhwa**\*, Atharv Sonwane\*, Daman Arora\*, Abhav Mehrotra, Saiteja Utpala, Ramakrishna B Bairi, Aditya Kanade, Nagarajan Natarajan<br>
<span style="color:red">*NeurIPS 2024 Workshop on Open-World Agents*</span><br>
[[Project page](https://masai-dev-agent.github.io/)] [[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.11638)]

**CORE: Resolving Code Quality Issues Using LLMs**<br>
**Nalin Wadhwa**, Jui Pradhan, Atharv Sonwane, Surya Prakash Sahu, Nagarajan Natarajan, Aditya Kanade, Suresh Parthasarathy, Sriram Rajamani<br>
<span style="color:red">*Proceedings of the ACM on Software Engineering, FSE 2024*</span><br>
[[ACM](https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3643762)] [[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.18613)]

### Other Interests

Outside of research,  I greatly enjoy reading fiction, philosophy, and everything in between. I also enjoy cooking, making electronic music, and can play almost all racket sports.

I grew up in various cities across India, but my roots are in Delhi.

### Contact

The best way to reach me is by [email](mailto:nalin.wadhwa02@gmail.com).
